followUps: F3: CopilotEventWindow.clear(companyId) not wired to companies.archive — IPC does not exist in codebase today; deferred to milestone that adds it. Public method exists + tested. Zero-surface-area until then.

F4: Backup/restore does not re-bootstrap system-copilot for pre-M33 backups (M23 path predates is_system column from M31 migration 0010). Workaround: delete SQLite file + let seedIfEmpty re-bootstrap. ~30 LOC fix in backupService.ensurePostRestoreSystemEmployees() — deferred to M34+.

notes: M33 (Copilot Service) COMPLETE (2026-04-17T01:30Z). All 11 tasks shipped (T0–T10). +66 unit tests (1033 → 1099, exceeded ~25 target by +41 — finer-grained per-task test coverage than the design doc estimated). +1 E2E spec (8 → 9 spec files; +1 Playwright case 9 → 10). 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean steady throughout. T10 commit: 2fc998e (chore(m33): M33 T10 — docs + verification + milestone marker). Documentation: NEW docs/user-guide/copilot-service.md (F10-style); Phase 5 design §9 M33 row 🚧 → ✅; CLAUDE.md Phase 5 + IPC + bus events + Troubleshooting (incl. NODE_MODULE_VERSION ABI dance entry); CHANGELOG.md M33 entry; README.md Intelligence Layer + tests badge 1033 → 1099.

Next milestone: M34 (Copilot UI — sidebar panel + dashboard widget + Cmd+Shift+K + insight cards + dismiss action + ask input). Phase 5 design §9 estimates ~15 unit tests for M34. Renderer-only milestone — consumes the M33 IPC surface. No new bus events, no new IPC channels, no new providers. M33 architectural seams (three-tier canned test seam, pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, AbortController stop, is_system filter-sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, atomic + ledger commit cadence, ABI rebuild dance) all carry forward unchanged.

M33 follow-ups (F3, F4) documented in Phase 5 design doc §16 — both deferred, neither blocks M34. F3 awaits a companies.archive IPC that doesn't exist in the codebase today. F4 awaits a M34+ session that adds the post-restore system-employee bootstrap.

Verification recipe re-confirmed at M33 T10: (1) Node ABI: cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run install. (2) pnpm test → 1099/1099 in 36.87s. (3) Electron ABI: pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar. (4) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 10/10 in 25.8s. Repeat the dance when alternating between vitest and Playwright.

Patterns proven across M30/M31/M32/M33 and ready for M34: three-tier canned test seam (now four-member quartet), {rows, truncated} envelope, data-step-kind stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController stop, atomic + Loki-ledger commit cadence (`chore(loki): M<N> T<N> — commit ledger (<sha>)`), ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, is_system + filter-sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, IPC mutation must emit bus event (invariant #11).
